jobs.title: Client Manager (Singapore)
jobs.content: <p><strong>Client Manager (Singapore)</strong></p><p>Modern Health is the employer-sponsored mental-health benefits platform pioneered around precision-mental-healthcare-as-a-service & the digital-mental-healthcare segment.</p>

jobs.title: Staff AI Product Engineer
jobs.content: <p>Lead Modern Health's AI Product Engineering function across the Care Platform / Coordination / Provider Network stack.</p>
